setting: 夜の帰り道、久しぶりに元カノへ電話する
lyrics:
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
Don't need nobody else
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
Don't need nobody else

[Verse 1]
Smell like smoke, nuit de l'homme
It's been a while since we last spoke
So tell me, how's it go?
Still love blues, nothin' new
Careless love, I've had a few
How 'bout you?

[Chorus]
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
Don't need nobody else
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
Don't need nobody else

[Verse 2]
I never have thought
When you're gone
I'd find it hard to carry on
And it's probably 'cause
I fell in love way back then
And I think about us when
I think about us when

[Chorus]
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
I got nobody else
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
I got, I got nobody else

[Outro]
Ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, no-no
Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh

lyricsJa.en: And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
lyricsJa.ja: 僕はひとりで、ふらつきながらベッドへ戻る

lyricsJa.en: Don't need nobody else
lyricsJa.ja: 誰もいらない

lyricsJa.ja: 煙とニュイ・ドゥ・ロムの香りがする

lyricsJa.ja: 最後に話してから、もうずいぶん経ったね

lyricsJa.en: So tell me, how's it go?
lyricsJa.ja: だから教えて、最近どう？

lyricsJa.en: Still love blues, nothin' new
lyricsJa.ja: まだブルースが好きなんだ、何も変わってない

lyricsJa.en: Careless love, I've had a few
lyricsJa.ja: 軽はずみな恋も、いくつかしてきた

lyricsJa.en: How 'bout you?
lyricsJa.ja: 君はどう？

lyricsJa.en: Don't need nobody else

I never have thought

lyricsJa.en: When you're gone
lyricsJa.ja: 君がいなくなったら

lyricsJa.ja: こんなに生きていくのが難しくなるなんて

lyricsJa.en: And it's probably 'cause
lyricsJa.ja: それはたぶん

lyricsJa.en: I fell in love way back then
lyricsJa.ja: あの頃、恋に落ちてしまったから

lyricsJa.ja: ふと僕たちのことを思い出す

lyricsJa.ja: 僕たちのことを思い出すんだ

All my friends are drunk again

lyricsJa.en: Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh
lyricsJa.ja: ウー、ウー、ウー

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Hey, Mia...
sentences.displayHtml: Hey, Mia...

sentences.text: It's been a while since we last spoke.
sentences.displayHtml: It's been a while since we last spoke.

conversation.japanese: ねえ、Mia……最後に話してから、ずいぶん経ったね。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Yeah.
sentences.displayHtml: Yeah.

sentences.text: I didn't expect your call this late, but I'm glad you did.
sentences.displayHtml: I didn't expect your call this late, but I'm glad you did.

sentences.text: So, how's it go?
sentences.displayHtml: So, how's it go?

conversation.japanese: うん。こんな遅くに電話が来るとは思わなかったけど、話せてうれしいよ。それで、最近どう？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Honestly, nothin' new.
sentences.displayHtml: Honestly, nothin' new.

sentences.text: I left the bar early, and now I'm stumblin' back to bed.
sentences.displayHtml: I left the bar early, and now I'm stumblin' back to bed.

conversation.japanese: 正直、何も変わってないよ。バーを早めに出て、今はふらつきながらベッドに戻ってるところ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: all by myself again?
sentences.displayHtml: all by myself again?

sentences.text: Ren, you always say you're fine, but you sound lonely.
sentences.displayHtml: Ren, you always say you're fine, but you sound lonely.

conversation.japanese: またひとりで？Ren、いつも平気だって言うけど、声が寂しそう。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I keep saying I need nobody else, but on nights like this, it feels like a lie.
sentences.displayHtml: I keep saying I need nobody else, but on nights like this, it feels like a lie.

conversation.japanese: 誰もいらないって言い続けてるけど、こういう夜はそれが嘘みたいに感じる。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Ren, I know.
sentences.displayHtml: Ren, I know.

sentences.text: We both tried to act like moving on was easy.
sentences.displayHtml: We both tried to act like moving on was easy.

conversation.japanese: Ren……わかるよ。私たち、お互い前に進むのは簡単だってふりしてたよね。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I never thought it would be this hard to carry on.
sentences.displayHtml: I never thought it would be this hard to carry on.

sentences.text: Maybe part of me is still stuck way back then.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe part of me is still stuck way back then.

conversation.japanese: こんなに前に進むのが難しいなんて思わなかった。たぶん僕の一部は、まだあの頃に取り残されてる。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I think part of me is too.
sentences.displayHtml: I think part of me is too.

sentences.text: But don't say you have nobody else just because tonight hurts.
sentences.displayHtml: But don't say you have nobody else just because tonight hurts.

conversation.japanese: 私の一部もそうかもしれない。でも、今夜つらいからって「誰もいない」なんて言わないで。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I don't know what I expected when I called you.
sentences.displayHtml: I don't know what I expected when I called you.

sentences.text: Maybe I just wanted to hear your voice.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe I just wanted to hear your voice.

conversation.japanese: 君に電話して、何を期待してたのかわからない。ただ声が聞きたかっただけかも。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Then stay on the phone until you get home.
sentences.displayHtml: Then stay on the phone until you get home.

sentences.text: We don't have to fix us tonight.
sentences.displayHtml: We don't have to fix us tonight.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ、家に着くまで電話をつないでて。今夜、私たちのことを無理に答えにしなくていい。
